manifest.author: uuu.gl
manifest.name: uuu.gl Markdown Uploader
manifest.description: Upload your notes to uuu.gl as rendered Markdown documents with internal links preserved.

manifest.author: Sayed Hamid Fatimi
manifest.name: Valeon
manifest.description: Publish, edit, and sync posts with the Valeon author dashboard. Lints frontmatter against the live schema, handles inline images and assets, and reconciles the vault with remote state.

manifest.author: Valnote
manifest.name: Valnote Calculator
manifest.description: Natural language calculator with unit conversions, currencies, dates, and more.

manifest.author: ryanjamurphy
manifest.name: Vantage - Advanced search builder
manifest.description: Build advanced search queries in Obsidian.

manifest.author: 4Source
manifest.name: VARE
manifest.description: Now you can easily manage your plugins and themes. Simply select the version you want or install unlisted versions from GitHub. You can also install beta version and switch back if necessary.

manifest.author: Kunal Jain
manifest.name: Variant Editor
manifest.description: Create variations of words and sentences and compare them, in context, with a single click

manifest.author: Giorgos Sarigiannidis
manifest.name: Varinote
manifest.description: Add variables in templates and set their values on-the-fly during the note creation.

manifest.author: tadashi-aikawa
manifest.name: Various Complements
manifest.description: This plugin enables you to complete words like the auto-completion of IDE

manifest.author: Mitra98t
manifest.name: Vault 2 Book
manifest.description: Converts your notes to a book

manifest.author: daniegee
manifest.name: Vault Activity
manifest.description: Track your note activity stats with streak highlights and visualisation widgets

manifest.author: Tharushka Dinujaya
manifest.name: VaultAI
manifest.description: Transform your note-taking with an intelligent AI assistant powered by Google's Gemini AI. Features a sleek floating chat interface for seamless writing assistance, content generation, and smart note enhancement.

manifest.author: Chris Cornutt
manifest.name: Vault AI Buddy
manifest.description: An AI-powered assistant for your vault for inspection and introspection of all your notes...and then some.

manifest.author: ebullient
manifest.name: Vault as MCP
manifest.description: MCP server connecting Open WebUI, Claude Desktop, and other LLMs to your vault.

manifest.author: Masahiro Hiramori
manifest.name: Vault Backup
manifest.description: Create local ZIP backups of your vault with automatic retention management.

manifest.author: Andrew Kopylev
manifest.name: Vault Bridge SFTP
manifest.description: Bridge your vault across devices through your own SSH/SFTP server. Bidirectional sync with conflict resolution, multi-device safety, and full self-hosting.

manifest.author: Exo Ascension
manifest.name: Vault Chat
manifest.description: A ChatGPT bot trained on your vault notes. Ask your AI questions about your own thoughts and ideas!

manifest.author: Evgenii Bykovskikh
manifest.name: Vault Chat Agent
manifest.description: Chat with an AI assistant that can search your vault, inspect notes, and prepare edits for review.

manifest.author: rapphcd
manifest.name: Vault Cleaner
manifest.description: Clean unused medias, untitled and duplicated leafs.

manifest.author: Ezra-Y
manifest.name: Vault Clone
manifest.description: Create a new vault by cloning another vault's theme and configuration.

manifest.author: Wanjin5508
manifest.name: Vault Coach
manifest.description: Local knowledge Q&A and interview practice from your vault using Ollama.

manifest.author: Jacob Mei
manifest.name: Vault Curate
manifest.description: Hybrid search: BM25, on-device WebGPU embeddings, fuzzy title matching. Multilingual with strong Chinese/CJK support. Optional AI auto-generates note descriptions and grouped Maps of Content. Local-first, no API keys.

manifest.author: Taha Yigit Melek
manifest.name: Vault Dictionary
manifest.description: Automatically highlight and display definitions for specific words throughout your notes.

manifest.author: Pluppen
manifest.name: Vault Encrypt
manifest.description: Encrypts and decrypts the contents of the vault using a password.

manifest.author: openabe
manifest.name: Vault Encryptor
manifest.description: Manual right-click encryption/decryption for files and folders with blocked .enc editing.

manifest.author: DecafDev
manifest.name: Vault Explorer
manifest.description: Explore your vault in visual format

manifest.author: Louan Fontenele
manifest.name: Vault File Renamer
manifest.description: Standardizes vault file names with lowercase text, accent removal, custom replacement rules, extension filters, folder and file blacklists, and a manual sweep command.

manifest.author: Mikhail Savin
manifest.name: Vault Full Statistics
manifest.description: Vault statistics in the status bar plus a dedicated view with own/source ratio and a 30-day sparkline of how your knowledge base evolves.

manifest.author: Roger Deng
manifest.name: Vault Inspector
manifest.description: Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files.

manifest.author: Allan Engelhardt
manifest.name: Vault Intelligence
manifest.description: Research your vault with an AI agent powered by Google Gemini, discover related notes through semantic search, and analyze specific documents with contextual note referencing.

manifest.author: Tom Han
manifest.name: VaultLlama
manifest.description: Local AI chat using Ollama with safe context controls.

manifest.author: Brians Tjipto
manifest.name: Vault LLM Assistant
manifest.description: Uses AI to answer questions and create notes about your vault with proper citations

manifest.author: @gapmiss
manifest.name: Vault Name
manifest.description: Display and customize the vault name (title) in the side navigation file explorer.

repo.Err: Plugin vault-name-status-bar was removed, skipping repository extraction

manifest.author: @rscopic
manifest.name: Vault Nickname
manifest.description: Override the vault's display name and/or title order. Intended to disambiguate vaults with the same folder name when adhering to a common folder structure between projects.

repo.Err: Plugin vault-okr-manager was removed, skipping repository extraction

manifest.author: Sebastian Hanke
manifest.name: Vault Operator
manifest.description: Agentic AI operating layer for your vault. Discovers and uses installed plugins, maintains persistent unified memory, and adapts to your workflows, skills and tools with full safety controls.

manifest.author: DejanDj79
manifest.name: Vault Palette
manifest.description: Customize folder, file, and tag colors.

manifest.author: one-wheeled-driver
manifest.name: Vault Passport
manifest.description: Give your notes a passport to the outside world. Exports documents to polished PDFs, resolving [[wiki-links]] into proper citations so they stand alone without the vault.

manifest.author: Jacob Bakholm
manifest.name: Vault Plus
manifest.description: Vault health dashboard — orphans, broken links, empty and oversized notes, duplicates, unused tags, unreferenced attachments — with one-click fixes.

manifest.author: Stefmf
manifest.name: Vault Pulse
manifest.description: A GitHub-style activity heatmap of your vault's file activity across the last 365 days.

manifest.author: Alexander
manifest.name: Vault Review
manifest.description: Randomly review your vault and track progress.

manifest.author: Eray Aydın
manifest.name: VaultSearch
manifest.description: Local-first hybrid search for your vault — combines keyword (BM25), semantic (vector embeddings), and fuzzy title matching. Multilingual, on-device, no cloud.

manifest.author: Bob Hyman
manifest.name: Vault Share
manifest.description: Share vaults between devices and users through Google Drive.

manifest.author: Technerium
manifest.name: Vault Size History
manifest.description: Graph of the number of files in the Vault.

manifest.author: Obsidian
manifest.name: Vault Stats
manifest.description: Provides methods to retrieve statistics about the vault, such as the number of notes, total word count, recently modified notes, and more.

manifest.author: caesarloo
manifest.name: Vault SVN
manifest.description: Manage SVN working copies inside your vault. Desktop-only: executes system svn CLI commands via shell (child_process) and accesses filesystem directly.

manifest.author: Justin Bird
manifest.name: VaultSync
manifest.description: Sync vault with cloud storage provider.

manifest.author: Andrew Boldi
manifest.name: Vault Sync (REST)
manifest.description: Two-way sync with a GitHub repo via REST API. Works on iOS for vaults of any size including images, where git-protocol plugins crash from WebView memory limits.

manifest.author: Toto Tvalavadze
manifest.name: Vault Tasks
manifest.description: Collects Markdown tasks from every note into a grouped task view.
